case_title: MODERN WHOLESALE STATIONERS VS OTT'S STATIONERY INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MODERN WHOLESALE STATIONERS AS TO DEFENDANT OTT'S STATIONERY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OTT'S STATIONERY INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MODERN WHOLESALE STATIONERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTT'S STATIONERY INC. $3,446.33 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,482.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT OTT'S STATIONERY INC. HEARING SET FOR NOV-29-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
POS FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED UNABLE TO SERVE.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT OTT'S STATIONERY INC. HEARING SET FOR JAN-10-1994 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
POS FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED UNABLE TO SERVE.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JAN-10-1994, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT OTT'S STATIONERY INC.
